data.title: Cardano shares $77M of tokens to 11 delegated reps for ‘resilience and diversity’ goals
data.description:
The Cardano Foundation has delegated a total of 220 million ADA to 11 selected Delegated Representatives aka DReps, which comes up to around $77 million at current prices. All 11 of these representatives were chosen by the community or are prominent figures in the Cardano ecosystem who vote on governance issues on behalf of delegated […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cardano-delegated-reps-diversity-goals/

data.title: Huawei fights back as EU targets ‘high-risk’ suppliers
data.description:
Huawei has responded to the European Union’s plan to phase out its technology, calling the decision a violation of the union’s principles. The European Union had earlier proposed a new plan to remove suppliers that the bloc’s decision makers determine to be “high risk” from critical sectors. Huawei accuses the EU of violating its own […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/huawei-fights-eu-targets-high-risk-suppliers/

data.title: Trump Media Set to Issue Non-Transferable Crypto Tokens, Cutoff Date February 2
data.description:
Trump Media & Technology Group Corp. (DJT) has officially announced the date for its highly anticipated distribution of a new digital token to its shareholders, as part of its partnership with cryptocurrency exchange Crypto. com. The record date for this digital token initiative will be February 2, 2026
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/breaking-news-ticker/trump-media-set-to-issue-non-transferable-crypto-tokens-cutoff-date-february-2/

data.title: XRP’s Quiet Phase May Be Setting Up A Sudden Breakout: Expert
data.description:
XRP’s next big rise could come with hardly any warning, traders and analysts warn. Markets are quiet now. That quiet has happened before, and it has sometimes been followed by sharp moves that catch most people off guard. Related Reading: Bitcoin Senses Risk As Trump Balks At Europe With Major Tariffs History Of Sudden Moves According to several community analysts, XRP has a pattern of long quiet periods followed by fast spikes
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/xrps-quiet-phase-may-be-setting-up-a-sudden-breakout-expert/

data.title: CME Predicts High Probability of Fed Rate Stability in January
data.description: CME's "FedWatch" tool indicates a 95% chance that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates unchanged in January. According to ChainCatcher, there is a 5% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut. By March, the likelihood of a cumulative 25 basis point cut stands at 20.6%, while the probability of maintaining the current rate is 78.5%. The chance of a cumulative 50 basis point reduction is 0.9%.
